Name: Orders YoY %
Expression: DIVIDE ( [Total Orders] - [Total Orders LY], [Total Orders LY] )

Name: On-Time Fulfillment %
Expression:
VAR OnTimeOrders =
    CALCULATE (
        DISTINCTCOUNT ( FactInternetSales[SalesOrderNumber] ),
        FactInternetSales[ShipDate] <= FactInternetSales[DueDate]
    )

RETURN
DIVIDE ( OnTimeOrders, [Total Orders] )

Name: Customer First Purchase Date
Expression:
CALCULATE (
    MIN ( FactInternetSales[OrderDate] ),
    ALLEXCEPT ( FactInternetSales, FactInternetSales[CustomerKey] )
)

Name: New Customers
Expression:
CALCULATE (
    DISTINCTCOUNT ( FactInternetSales[CustomerKey] ),
    FILTER (
        VALUES ( FactInternetSales[CustomerKey] ),
        [Customer First Purchase Date] >= MIN ( DimDate[Date] )
            && [Customer First Purchase Date] <= MAX ( DimDate[Date] )
    )
)

Name: Repeat Customers
Top Category
Expression:
CALCULATE(
    FIRSTNONBLANK( 'DimProductCategory'[Category], 1 ),
    TOPN(
        1,
        SUMMARIZE(
            'DimProductCategory',
            'DimProductCategory'[Category],
            "Sales", [Total Sales]
        ),
        [Sales],
        DESC
    )
)

Name: Dynamic Subtitle Customers
Expression:
VAR Pct =
    FORMAT( [Customers % to Goal], "0%" )

VAR Category =
    [Top Category]

RETURN
"Customers are " & Pct & " to goal, led by " & LOWER(Category) & " customers."

Name: Dynamic Subtitle Orders
Expression:
VAR Pct =
    FORMAT( [Orders % to Goal], "0%" )

VAR Category =
    [Top Category]

RETURN
"Orders are " & Pct & " to goal, led by " & LOWER(Category) & " orders."

Name: Dynamic Subtitle Sales
Expression:
VAR Pct =
    FORMAT( [Sales % to Goal], "0%" )

VAR Category =
    [Top Category]

RETURN
"Sales are " & Pct & " to goal, led by " & LOWER(Category) & " sales."

Name: Dynamic Subtitle Sales Geography
Expression:
VAR GeoNameRaw =
    SELECTEDVALUE( DimGeography[Continent],
        SELECTEDVALUE( DimGeography[Country],
            SELECTEDVALUE( DimGeography[State Province],
                SELECTEDVALUE( DimGeography[City], BLANK() )
            )
        )
    )

VAR GeoName =
    IF( ISBLANK( GeoNameRaw ), "(global)", GeoNameRaw )

VAR PctOfSales =
    DIVIDE(
        [Total Sales],
        CALCULATE( [Total Sales], ALL( DimGeography ) )
    )

VAR PctFormatted =
    FORMAT( PctOfSales, "0%" )

RETURN
PctFormatted & " of all sales are attributed to " & GeoName & "."

Expression:
VAR Pct =
    FORMAT( [Customers % to Goal], "0%" )
RETURN
"Customers " & Pct & " to Goal"
